heading: Marking pierheads in certain lakes
label: 550 Marking pierheads in certain lakes
text: The Commandant of the Coast Guard shall properly mark all pierheads belonging to the United States situated on the northern and northwestern lakes, whenever he is duly notified by the department charged with the construction or repair of pierheads that the construction or repair of any such pierhead has been completed.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 551 to 555 were renumbered sections 2921 to 2925 of this title, respectively.
